ai_overview: Viktor's Stakeholder Digest email was unavailable for 04/05/2026 — Microsoft 365 authentication is pending and this digest is built from Jira and Slack sources only. Monday 4 May was the UK/Ireland Early May Bank Holiday, producing near-universal quiet across the 22 tracked team members. Slack recorded zero messages from any tracked individual since May 1. The Serbian-based developers were unaffected by the Irish bank holiday: Novica Vukobratovic progressed four tickets (GDCU-8877 phone number admin field moved to In QA, GDCU-7363 Slots widget updated, with GDCU-8611 and GDCU-8894 updated early this morning), and Nebojsa Stanic continued work on GDCU-8924 (Origins API integration, In Progress). Harden Wallace had six tickets move through the QA pipeline on May 4 — including the high-priority Brand Carousel (GDCU-8861), Slot Games Hub Provider Names (GDCU-8865), and Author Carousel Shortcode (GDCU-8849) — though the late evening timestamps (16:25–23:12 BST) may indicate automated pipeline transitions rather than direct manual activity. DC9 is underway following DC8 closing at 136 SPs on April 30. The full team returns today (Tuesday, May 5). Vic Dadson remains on medical sick leave, and Miguel Migneco is flagged as off next Tuesday (May 6). No blockers or hotfixes recorded on May 4.

people.name: Vic Dadson
people.summary: Remains on doctor-signed medical sick leave from 21 April (signed off for a fortnight). No Slack or Jira activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Mike DM'd on 23 April with encouraging news about a data engineering conversation with Chris in the BI team — Nemanja and the data team will provide support and knowledge-sharing on her return.

people.name: Jessica Dordevic
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 30 April: finalised Tinder Widget (GDCU-8546) matched-state UI decisions in DMs with Mike — agreed to hide interested/pass buttons post-match and remove the word 'betting' from the match label to accommodate casino variants. On 29 April shared DE HPC article Figma designs in #gdc-product-design-pod. Chloe noted in the sprint close that the Tinder design should close shortly.

people.name: Miguel Migneco
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Note: flagged to Mike on 30 April that he is off next Tuesday (6 May). Last active 27 April in #gdc-product-led-growth demonstrating Claude Design workflow for the Group Bets widget — rapid 15-minute prototype vs 3+ hours in Figma, with the recommendation to iterate in Claude first, then finish/polish in Figma post-stakeholder approval.

people.name: Ciara Carroll
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 1 May: raised GDCU-8947 (Cosmo Cash Machine ticket) in #gdc-product-design-pod. On 29 April published comprehensive Claude Design usage guidelines to #core-product and #gdc-pod — covering group etiquette, capabilities, and the gambling.com design system (3,000+ components, full brand assets, Orion GitHub integration). On 28 April finalised CA/FR oplist card redesign in #gdc-product-led-growth and coordinated Claude Design roadmap next steps with Mike.

people.name: Josh Smith
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 1 May: announced the new Card Carousel shortcode in #gdc-nonen-sync with Confluence docs and test page link. Also opened a design decision thread in #gdc-product-design-pod on the Carousel Banner Shortcode (GDCU-8787) — proposing to reuse the Simple Banner shortcode with added navigation arrows to reduce editor complexity. DC9 sprint planning is underway.

people.name: Chloe Christie
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 1 May: published comprehensive DC8 release summary and DC9 planned work in #gdc-core — DC9 features include Brand Carousel (GDCU-8861), Ace Navigation Improvements (GDCU-8813), CA/FR Casino Page Oplist Redesign (GDCU-8878), Viktor AI CWV Recommendations (GDCU-8925), SlotsLaunch Game Grid (GDCU-8900), Experts Carousel Shortcode (GDCU-8800), World Cup Predictor Game (GDCU-8935), and Group Bets Widget (GDCU-8904). DC8 closed at 136 SPs on 30 April.

people.name: Carlos Blauth
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. No Slack or Jira activity visible in recent weeks. Involved in FTP App and deep-link betslip project based on channel membership. Last DM with Mike was 9 April confirming Ace AI feedback report volumes (one production report per day is correct).

people.name: Eoin McCarthy
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Last active 22 April in DMs with Mike — confirmed Betting Tips Hub (GDCU-8512) load-more pagination (~30 tips) is manageable from a page size perspective via the Matrix API. Named as stakeholder on GDCU-8877 (phone number email form ticket now In QA with Novica).

people.name: Harden Wallace
people.summary: Six tickets moved through the QA pipeline on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May — GDCU-8861 (Brand Carousel, In QA, 16:25 BST), GDCU-8865 (Slot Games Hub Provider Names and Dimensions, In QA, 16:37), GDCU-8849 (Author Carousel Shortcode new style, In QA, 21:17), GDCU-8854 (Geo Selector arrow collapse bug, In QA, 22:19), GDCU-8929 (Sidebar Navigation for Casino/Betting Strategy Articles, In Progress, 23:04), and GDCU-8912 (Remove Rotate Device Message from Cosmo Spins Desktop, In QA, 23:12). The late evening timestamps suggest possible automated pipeline transitions or continued work through the bank holiday. On 24 April provided a technical assessment to Mike on why a single-winner Cosmo Wheel iPhone prize lock is not currently achievable.

people.name: Kelvin Yee
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. No Jira or Slack activity visible in recent weeks. Last DM with Mike was 9 April — proposed using Site Article Categories with a 'Tips' tag and publish timestamps to filter stale racing tips from the News Hub Most Popular section.

people.name: Milan Nikolic
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. No Slack or Jira activity visible in April 2026. Last DM with Mike was 26 March regarding the Global Strategy Hub (GDCU-8653) — confirmed the v1 approach is to serve the page in English with localised casino results. Previously flagged in #gdc-high-agency (13 March) that 5pm meetings are too late for Serbia.

people.name: Nebojsa Stanic
people.summary: Active on 4 May (May 4 is not a public holiday in Serbia). GDCU-8924 (Implement feedback for Origins API integration) updated at 14:14 BST and remains In Progress. No Slack activity visible. This is the first Jira activity visible from Nebojsa in recent weeks.

people.name: Novica Vukobratovic
people.summary: Active across May 4 and early morning May 5. On 4 May: GDCU-8877 (Add Field to Manage Phone Numbers on Email Confirmation Pages in Admin Panel) moved to In QA at 11:11 BST, and GDCU-7363 (Slots widget minor filter issues) updated at 13:15 BST. Early this morning (May 5): GDCU-8611 (Update 'Feature' Tag, In QA, 08:30 BST) and GDCU-8894 (Refactor scoped styles on Vue components, In Progress, 07:41 BST) updated — confirming Novica is already working today. Four tickets active across two days indicates solid ongoing velocity.

people.name: Sanja Budic
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Last Slack activity was 8 April in #gdc-deep-link-betslip-project — reported the /api/mcp/deep_links endpoint for Bookies brand returning responses above 5 seconds, flagged as a performance concern to Alex Kornilov. No Jira or Slack activity visible since.

people.name: Robin John
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent contribution was 30 April in #gdc-pod: confirmed QA sign-off for all DC8 release tickets — all clear, with a note that a few content-related issues need separate logging. With DC9 now underway and Harden's 6 tickets now In QA, Robin and Shane will have QA work ready to pick up today.

people.name: Shane McGrath
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent Slack activity was 30 April: raised a bug in #gdc-pod — global pages on mobile burger menu links are not geo-locating (always redirecting to UK geo) — queried whether already raised. Also co-signed the DC8 QA clearance with Robin. Last active in #prism-cms-feedback was 31 March flagging several CMS UI issues. With Harden's 6 tickets now In QA, Shane will have work to resume today.

people.name: Dean Ryan
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 30 April in DMs with Mike — discussing logging tipster success rates (data exists and will be updated) and an odds formatting issue in horse racing tips widgets. Received the World Cup Predictor game Vercel prototype from Mike at end of April 30 for review. Also provided F2P app feedback on 15 April in #gdc-f2p-apps — suggested reframing app as a 'Cosmo App' with slots library and free spins offers.

people.name: Michael Butlin
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 30 April in DMs with Mike until late (mentioned working until 2am) — contributing quiz question copy options for the World Cup Predictor game and reviewing the Vercel prototype. Mike advised rest and confirmed he is off until Thursday 7 May. Michael is actively engaged on the WC Predictor feature development.

people.name: Dan Smullen
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 28 April in DMs with Mike navigating Claude Design access — Mike helped him locate the design canvas via the easel icon. On 15 April flagged F2P game issues in #gdc-f2p-apps (some games not working, Cosmo Spins 24-hour wait bug post-login).

people.name: Gabriel Cornoiu
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 1 May: active in #gdc-nonen-sync (checking Card Carousel Confluence docs) and #gdc-pod (reporting Admin Panel issue flagged by Dean, checking Global HP offer language display). Posted in #gdc-pdmt offering morning availability for DMs. On 29 April in #gdc-pdmt reminded team about the Learning Hub going live with the weekly release.

people.name: Diana Thurmann
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent activity was 1 May in #gdc-nonen-sync clarifying that Josh's Card Carousel announcement includes a Confluence docs link. Last DM with Mike was 22 April — receiving the Clarity API key and usage instructions (10 calls/day strict limit) for Viktor-based analytics automation. Created #gdc-nonen-market-updates channel on 21 April and announced Iceland geo launch in #core-division on 16 April.

people.name: Colin Brannigan
people.summary: No activity on Bank Holiday Monday 4 May. Most recent channel activity was 27 April in #core-division-leads — posted Q1 earnings call prep request asking division leads for wins across AI transformation, channel diversification, geo growth, SEO, and product campaigns. Also raised NZ affiliate marketing regulatory risk (strong likelihood that NZ will close off the affiliate channel entirely under proposed legislation). Last DM with Mike was 29 April discussing the freebets.com Bet Finder product and product roadmap alignment.
